entry.note: <L>2490<pc>12,1<k1>at<k2>at<h>2<e>1 <hom>2.</hom> <s>at</s> ¦ <ab>cl.</ab> 1. <ab>P.</ab> <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>a/tati</s> (<ls>Naigh.</ls>; <ab>p.</ab> <s>a/tat</s> or <s>a/tamAna</s>), <div n="to"/>to go constantly, walk, run, <ls>RV.</ls>; <div n="to"/>to obtain, <ls>L.</ls><info whitneyroots="at,3"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="1P,1Ā"/> <LEND>

<L>1188<pc>1-0087<k1>at<k2>at<h>1 1. {#at#}¦, {#a/tati, atitA, atizyati, AtIt#} {%beständig gehen%} <ls>DHĀTUP. 3,1.</ls> {#a/tati = gatikarma#} <ls>NAIGH. 2,14.</ls> {%wandern, laufen%}: {#sA no viSvA ati dvizaH svasFranyA ftAvarI . atannaheva sUryaH ..#} <ls>ṚV. 6,61,9.</ls> med.: {#arI^rama\data^mAnaM ci\deto^H#} <ls n="ṚV.">2,38,3.</ls> {#sa\ma\re 'ta^mAnAH#} <ls n="ṚV.">6,9,2.</ls> <div n="v">— Vgl. {#aw#} . <div n="p">— {#aBi#} {%besuchen, einkehren%}: {#atiTiraByatito gfhAnBavati#} <ls>NIR. 4,5.</ls> <div n="p">— {#ava#} {%hinabgehen%}: {#avAtita#} <ls>NIR. 10,13.</ls> <div n="p">— {#sam#} {%besuchen%}: {#sama^tasi ka\pota^ iva garBa\Dim#} <ls>ṚV. 1,30,4.</ls> <LEND>

<L>204999<pc>4-291-b<k1>at<k2>at √{#at#}¦ mit {#anu#} in {#anvatya#} (= {#anugamayya#} <ab>Comm.</ab>) <ls>ĀPAST. ŚR. 9,10,15</ls>. Schon nach der Betonung <ls>TBR. 1,4,3,6</ls> ist diese Trennung in {#anvatyAva/rtayet#} nicht denkbar.<info n="sup_4"/> <LEND>
